_comment:
Vision-pose source calibration. Both stack converters return `.notImplemented` in v1: AP `VISO_*` and PX4 `EKF2_EV_*` are stack-specific (sensor type, delay, noise variance differ).

Registered for discoverability — Vehicle Inspector lists it; runtime returns a precise 'not implemented in this app version' message.

then.detail: Vision-pose calibration is not implemented in this app version. AP `VISO_*` and PX4 `EKF2_EV_*` parameter families require a per-stack authoring pass.
Vision-pose calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
